description_long: This is a stylized mailbox mounted on a single, slightly curved wooden post. The mailbox body is rectangular with rounded edges and is painted a matte gray, featuring subtle weathering marks and highlights. The front door is open, revealing a hollow interior for mail storage, and a red flag is attached to the right side, indicating mail presence. The mailbox door is front-hinged and appears to be made of the same material as the main body. The post is textured to resemble natural wood, with visible knots and grain patterns. No identification markings or numbers are visible on the mailbox.
description: A stylized gray mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a curved wooden post and featuring a front-hinged door.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mailbox's open front door, red flag, and the full length of the wooden post.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open mail slot and the mailbox's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the red flag and open door visible, showing the mailbox's depth and post texture.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the mailbox and the wooden post, with the flag barely visible.
